name: Eggnog Bread Pudding with Rum Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray a 13 x 9 x 3 (3 quart) baking dish with non-stick spray. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine all bread pudding ingredients except bread and raisins. Blend until smooth using a wire whisk. Fold in bread cubes and raisins. Pour into sprayed baking dish.
3. Bake for 40-45 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
4. Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, combine all rum sauce ingredients. Cook over medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil, stirring constantly. Boil for 1 minute. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. Serve over warm bread pudding.
